meta.title: Centurion — 1 Human 1 AI
meta.description: 오직 당신에게만 응답하는 프라이빗 AI. 1 Human 1 AI.

hero.sub: 인생 사명을 발견하고 살아가도록 돕는 AI — 프라이빗하고 주권적이며 충성스럽다.

pricing.title: 경로 선택
pricing.lead: 경로를 선택하세요. {hold}로 제작 자리를 확보하세요. 보증금 후 즉시 Sovereign Remote를 받습니다.
pricing.stepPickDetail: Sovereign, Prime Pilot, or Prime — choose the path that fits.
pricing.stepHold: Pay {hold} to hold your build position
pricing.stepHoldDetail: Reserves your place in the build queue.
pricing.stepRemoteDetail: Your iPhone companion while your Sovereign is built.
pricing.stepMissionDetail: Personal Mission Discovery clarifies what you are for.
pricing.stepSoulDetail: Soul Document Process shapes personality and focus.
pricing.stepBuildDetail: Remaining amount after the hold is settled.
pricing.stepReceiveDetail: Hardware and purchased services delivered to you.
pricing.sovereignDescBeta: July 2026 Beta — first unit at a private launch price
pricing.sovereignNote: One Sovereign · {price} · {hold} hold deposits your place
pricing.sovereignNoteBeta: First Sovereign only · July 2026 Beta · {hold} hold deposits your place
pricing.pilotDesc: Walnut & copper Prime units — start your pilot
pricing.pilotNote: Per unit · {hold} hold deposits your place
pricing.primeDesc: Marble & brass Prime units for the boardroom
pricing.primeNote: Per unit · {hold} hold deposits your place
pricing.betaOnlyNote: Sovereign only. Subsequent units remain at full price.

footer.tagline: 1 Human 1 AI. Loyal, and entirely yours. For those who know that real privacy cannot be borrowed, rented, or shared.

order.title: Build your Sovereign — Centurion
order.description: Configure your Sovereign, Prime Pilot, or Prime engagement — secure a build slot or enquire.
